headline: CVRx (CVRX) Moves 11.6% Higher: Will This Strength Last?
summary: CVRx (CVRX) witnessed a jump in share price last session on above-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions for the stock doesn't suggest further strength down the road.
